claims.claim_text: US passport book renewal fee (adult, by mail)

sources.title: U.S. Department of State — Passport Fees
sources.note: Official fees page lists the adult passport book application fee as $130. Renewal by mail (Form DS-82) pays the application fee only; the $35 acceptance facility fee does not apply to mail renewals. Confirmed 2026-06-27.

verification_event.note: Read directly from travel.state.gov official Passport Fees page. 2026-06-27 기준. 최종 사람 승인 대기.

claims.claim_text: US passport card renewal fee (adult, by mail)

sources.title: U.S. Department of State — Passport Fees
sources.note: Official fees page lists the adult passport card application fee as $30. Renewal by mail (Form DS-82) pays the application fee only; the $35 acceptance facility fee does not apply to mail renewals. Confirmed 2026-06-27.

verification_event.note: Read directly from travel.state.gov official Passport Fees page. 2026-06-27 기준. 최종 사람 승인 대기.

claims.claim_text: US passport routine processing time in weeks

sources.title: U.S. Department of State — Get Your Processing Time
sources.note: Official processing times page (Last Updated April 16, 2026) states routine processing takes 4-6 weeks and expedited 2-3 weeks. Mailing time (up to 2 weeks each way) is separate. Processing time changes seasonally with demand.

verification_event.note: Read directly from travel.state.gov official Processing Times page. 2026-06-27 기준. Seasonal value — re-verify regularly. 최종 사람 승인 대기.
